channel.name: guitar-classical
channel.iaQuery: mediatype:audio AND ((subject:"classical guitar" OR subject:"guitar music" OR subject:"spanish guitar" OR subject:"flamenco guitar" OR subject:"lute" OR subject:"renaissance guitar") OR ((creator:"Andrés Segovia" OR creator:"Andres Segovia" OR creator:"Narciso Yepes" OR creator:"Julian Bream" OR creator:"Pepe Romero" OR creator:"Angel Romero" OR creator:"Los Romeros" OR creator:"Celedonio Romero" OR creator:"Regino Sainz de la Maza" OR creator:"Paco de Lucía" OR creator:"Paco de Lucia" OR creator:Sabicas OR creator:"Mario Escudero" OR creator:"Carlos Montoya" OR creator:"Manuel Barrueco" OR creator:"David Russell" OR creator:"Christopher Parkening" OR creator:"Ana Vidović" OR creator:"Sharon Isbin" OR creator:"Kazuhito Yamashita" OR creator:"Alirio Díaz" OR creator:"Alirio Diaz" OR creator:"Laurindo Almeida" OR creator:"Liona Boyd" OR creator:"Eliot Fisk" OR creator:"Göran Söllscher" OR creator:"Oscar Ghiglia" OR creator:"Konrad Ragossnig" OR creator:"Turibio Santos" OR creator:"Carlos Bonell" OR creator:"Jorge Morel" OR creator:"Manuel López Ramos" OR creator:"Li Jie" OR creator:"Jie Li" OR creator:"Rey de la Torre") OR ((creator:"Fernando Sor" OR creator:"Isaac Albéniz" OR creator:"Francisco Tárrega" OR creator:"Francisco Tarrega" OR creator:"Enrique Granados" OR creator:"Joaquín Rodrigo" OR creator:"Agustín Barrios" OR creator:"Manuel Ponce" OR creator:"Heitor Villa-Lobos" OR creator:"Mauro Giuliani" OR creator:"Leo Brouwer" OR creator:"Gaspar Sanz"))) AND NOT (subject:interview OR subject:talk OR subject:lecture OR title:interview OR subject:vocal OR subject:vocals OR subject:"vocal music" OR subject:song OR subject:songs OR subject:soprano OR subject:choral OR creator:"Laura DeNardis" OR creator:"Salli Terri"))
